creator: monwarez@mailoo.org
text:
I think we see more issue with mariadb103 because more people use this version, in my case I still had issue with mariadb104 and mariadb105 .
Doing a mysqlcheck --all-databases  stop just after mysql.index_stats with: Lost connection to MySQL server.
Maybe not related, but looking at upstream bug report, the latest mariadb105 is also crashing.
https://jira.mariadb.org/browse/MDEV-26388
